scripts.backup: powershell -Command "$d = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd_HHmm'; git add -A; git diff --cached --quiet; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { git commit -m ('wip: backup snapshot ' + $d) } else { Write-Host 'Nothing new to commit' -ForegroundColor Yellow }; git push origin master; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Host 'PUSH FAILED' -ForegroundColor Red } else { Write-Host 'Pushed to GitHub' -ForegroundColor Green }; $dest = 'D:\Backups\KiMaster_' + $d + '.bundle'; $null = New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'D:\Backups' -Force; git bundle create $dest --branches --tags; if (Test-Path $dest) { Write-Host ('Bundle saved: ' + $dest) -ForegroundColor Green; $size = (Get-Item $dest).Length / 1MB; Write-Host ('Size: ' + [math]::Round($size,1) + ' MB') -ForegroundColor Cyan; Get-ChildItem 'D:\Backups' -Filter 'KiMaster_*.bundle' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -Skip 25 | Remove-Item -Force } else { Write-Host 'BUNDLE CREATION FAILED' -ForegroundColor Red }"
